title: Shikinami type and SS
wikitext:
[]: Shikinami type and SS?             Quote Post by T. K. Simon » Sun Sep 05, 2021 1:13 pm What does Asuka mean by shikinami type? and in instrumentalization, the letters ss in the shikinami clones. I've been reading that people who say they have different meanings, Your opinion?

[]: Re: Shikinami type and SS?             Quote Post by Blockio » Sun Sep 05, 2021 1:23 pm Shikinami type just means that she's part of a clone series

[]: Re: Shikinami type and SS?             Quote Post by C.T.1290 » Sun Sep 05, 2021 4:31 pm Like the Ayanami types series of clones, Asuka is actually a member of the Shikinami series of clones, hence the change in her last name. Or rather, why this Asuka’s last name is different from Soryu’s.

[]: Re: Shikinami type and SS?             Quote Post by Raikyu » Sun Sep 05, 2021 4:57 pm I'm curious if the "Langley" surname has any meaning.

[]: Re: Shikinami type and SS?             Quote Post by C.T.1290 » Sun Sep 05, 2021 5:56 pm Raikyu wrote: I'm curious if the "Langley" surname has any meaning.

[]: Re: Shikinami type and SS?             Quote Post by Raikyu » Sun Sep 05, 2021 8:05 pm C.T.1290 wrote: Raikyu#930780 wrote: I'm curious if the "Langley" surname has any meaning.
